bottleneck_reason: Filings show improving revenue, but the robotics and 3D-vision bottleneck claim still needs customer, order, and segment proof.
revenue_transmission: Revenue transmits through module shipments, robotics/customer adoption, gross-margin recovery, and validated product mix.
required_next_evidence: Verify robotics/customer revenue split, order durability, dilution impact, and cash-flow conversion before upgrading payoff claims.
posterior_basis: Official report evidence supports H2 evidence-supported growth until L0/L1 business-line proof covers customer, order, and cash-flow conversion.

key_evidence_refs.claim: Revenue is improving, while cash-flow and valuation evidence remain incomplete for H5 support.

contrary_evidence: Operating cash flow, private-placement dilution, and robotics revenue split remain pressure points.
research_questions: Verify robotics/customer revenue split and order durability.
Quantify private-placement dilution and buyback execution before treating the candidate as action-ready.
